headline: What Makes Keysight Technologies (KEYS) a Compelling Bet in the AI Era?
summary: Madison Investments, an investment advisor, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for the “Madison Large Cap Fund”. A copy of the letter is available to download here. The Madison Large Cap Fund (Class I) declined 2.7% in the quarter, outperforming the S&P 500’s -4.33% return. The fund focuses on long-term capital appreciation. The quarter saw […]

headline: How Is Keysight’s Stock Performance Compared to Other Technology Stocks?

headline: KEYSIGHT TECHNOLOGIES IN (NYSE:KEYS) Scores Strong in High Growth Momentum Screen
summary: Keysight Technologies scores high on ChartMill's growth momentum screen with strong fundamentals, accelerating earnings and sales, plus a solid technical uptrend and favorable breakout setup.
